_meta.description: Claude Code custom agent system registry. Frontmatter format, model options, tool access.

model.description: Model to use. Defaults to parent's model if omitted.

tools.description: Tools this agent can access. All tools if omitted.

description.description: When to use this agent. CC uses this for automatic agent selection. CRITICAL field.

agent_definition.body: Markdown content that becomes the agent's system prompt / persona

parameters.prompt: Task-specific instructions (agent has NO prior context)
parameters.name: Addressable name for SendMessage

execution_modes.foreground: Blocks until agent completes. Use when result needed immediately.
execution_modes.background: Async execution. Notified on completion. Use for independent work.
execution_modes.parallel: Multiple Agent calls in single message. Use for independent tasks.

opus.strengths: Complex reasoning, nuanced judgment, creative generation, architecture
opus.use_for: Critical decisions, creative writing, complex analysis
opus.avoid_for: Simple transforms, high-volume operations, status checks

sonnet.strengths: Balanced quality/cost, research, code generation, analysis
sonnet.use_for: Most analytical tasks, research, moderate-complexity work
sonnet.avoid_for: Tasks requiring deep reasoning OR simple data transforms

haiku.strengths: Fast, cheap, good for simple tasks at volume
haiku.use_for: Status tracking, data extraction, simple transforms, high-volume ops
haiku.avoid_for: Creative work, complex reasoning, nuanced judgment

design_principles: Agents define WHO (persona/expertise), not WHAT (task steps)
Minimal tool access — only what the agent needs
Description field is the routing mechanism — make it precise
Jobs should be enumerable — if the list is unbounded, the agent is too broad
Model selection must match cognitive load
